changes: Made Agent Teams easier to follow with active-agent, current-stage, task, progress, and live-activity displays.
Added professional team templates with specialist instructions, sequenced tasks, and quality gates.
Added selectable Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, DeepSeek, configured provider, and custom-agent execution profiles.
Added live Agent Team canvas synchronization and clearer per-agent workflow cards.
Improved team pause, retry, approval, deletion, isolated worktree, and result-application behavior.
